tasks.title: Update timeout value from 10 to 5 seconds
tasks.description: In scratch/test_completion.py, change the timeout parameter in the requests.post call from 10 to 5 seconds for better responsiveness.

tasks.title: Add docstring example and type hints
tasks.description: Enhance the send_completion_request function by adding a practical usage example in its docstring and include proper type hints for all parameters and return value.

tasks.title: Improve error handling with specific exception types
tasks.description: Refactor the exception handling block to catch specific HTTP errors (like ConnectionError, Timeout) separately from general RequestException, providing more informative error messages.

tasks.title: Add logging instead of silent error returns
tasks.description: Replace the generic error dict return with proper logging using the logging module to record request failures while still returning user-friendly error messages.
